examples: At times it is little more than a self-serving diatribe.
On Christmas Eve, 2004, Graham posted a diatribe on the website 8a.
The blogger who started off the diatribe wrote a post attacking me publicly.
An outstanding example not on American media radar was the April 25 Patton diatribe at openDemocracy.
After a quick eye-roll, I resisted my immediate urge to launch into an uber-sarcastic diatribe.
